name: wxcode-admin-sprout-iot
title: Sprout Admin
description: Dark technical-fresh admin aesthetic: deep navy canvas (#0c1118), raised panels, lime (#84cc16) and cyan (#22d3ee) dual accents, amber/red severity ramp, Inter type with tabular figures, and dense hairline-bordered tables. Archetype = context-switcher topbar + left label rail + 4 KPI cards + 2-column grid (multi-channel sparkline panel + severity feed) + full-width records table, plus matching list, form, and detail screens. Built for high-density live-data consoles that must read at a glance.

query.en: Apply this dark technical admin aesthetic to my domain — deep navy canvas, lime/cyan dual accents, context-switcher topbar, left label rail, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, a multi-channel panel with stacked sparklines, a severity feed, and a dense records table with signal indicators, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个深色技术风格管理界面应用到我的领域：深海军蓝画布、青柠/青色双强调色、上下文切换顶栏、左侧标签栏、4 个带迷你图的 KPI 卡片、带堆叠迷你图的多通道面板、严重级别信息流，以及带信号指示器的密集记录表格，同时配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
